Our Product

QUINOVA Burger Patties

用秘魯藜麥和可可製成 · Made with Peruvian Quinoa & Cacao

A burger born from
5,000 years of Andean wisdom

QUINOVA combines two of Peru's most ancient and powerful superfoods — quinoa, the "golden grain of the Andes," and cacao, the sacred food of civilizations. Together they deliver a plant-based burger that is rich in protein, deeply flavorful, and respectful of the earth.

100% VeganEasy to CookNo PreservativesHigh ProteinSustainableNon-GMOUSDA OrganicHalal Certified

Patties
340g

85g

-18°C

Real Ingredients

Ancient Superfoods,
Modern Nutrition

秘魯超級食物 · 現代營養

🌾

Quinoa

秘魯藜麥 · 51%

Cultivated in the Peruvian Andes for over 5,000 years, quinoa is a complete protein with all 9 essential amino acids. Sacred to the Inca civilization, it remains a cornerstone of Andean culture.

Complete Protein High Fiber Iron Rich
🍫

Cacao

秘魯可可 · 25%

Peruvian cacao is celebrated worldwide for its rich, complex flavor. A powerful antioxidant, cacao gives QUINOVA its distinctive earthy depth — transforming each patty into a bold, savory experience.

Antioxidants Magnesium Flavor Depth
🌿

All Ingredients

真實原料 · Full Transparency
  • Peruvian Quinoa (51%)
  • Pea Protein
  • Peruvian Cacao (25%)
  • Sunflower Oil
  • Sea Salt
  • Marshmallow Root (1%)
  • Natural Flavor

Our Story

Where Peru
Meets Hong Kong

天然滋養，邁向美好未來。

Pacific Plant Exports SAC was born from a conviction: that Peru's extraordinary native ingredients deserve a place at the world's table. We combine centuries of Andean agricultural knowledge with modern food science to create products that are as nutritious as they are delicious.

Hong Kong — with its vibrant food culture, health-conscious consumers, and appetite for innovation — is the perfect home for QUINOVA's debut in Asia.

🌱
Sustainability First
Recyclable packaging, water-based inks, compostable bioplastic bags.
🏔️
Authentic Peruvian Origin
Every ingredient sourced from Peruvian farmers who have cultivated these lands for generations.
⭐
Premium Quality
USDA Organic, Non-GMO, HACCP, Halal and Kosher certified.
Why Hong Kong?

A Market Ready
for Innovation

High purchasing power, international food culture, and rapidly growing demand for plant-based alternatives among Millennials and Gen Z.

27%
Annual plant-based growth in HK
68%
HK consumers seeking healthier food
Our Commitment to the Planet
3
Good Health
12
Responsible Production

Aligned with UN Sustainable Development Goals.
